# Massachusetts Standards for the Protection of Personal Information

Jurisdiction: United States - Massachusetts
Region: US-MA
Citation: 201 CMR 17.00
Authority: Massachusetts Secretary of the Commonwealth
Source URL: https://www.mass.gov/regulations/201-CMR-17-standards-for-the-protection-of-personal-information-of-residents-of-the-commonwealth
Topics: security_breach, processor_contracts, accountability, sensitive_data
Keywords: 201 CMR 17, Massachusetts data security, WISP, personal information

## Summary
Massachusetts regulation requiring a written information security program and safeguards for personal information of Massachusetts residents.

## Key compliance obligations
- Maintain a written information security program.
- Use administrative, technical, and physical safeguards.
- Oversee service providers and access controls.
